rulings.Case Title: FLORA NG VS. STERLING REAL ESTATE PARNERS II, LLC
rulings.Calendar Matter: Application Top Expunge Notices Of Pendency Of Action And Attorneys' Fees And Costs; Req For Judicial Notice
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 6, 2012, line 10. DEFENDANT STERLING PACIFIC LENDING, INC.,DBA STERLING PACIFIC FINALCIAL'S Application To Expunge Notices Of Pendency Of Action And Attorneys' Fees And Costs. Grant, plaintiff failed to establish probable validity of her claim by a preponderance of the evidence. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HENRY DEGUZMAN CRUZ et al VS. JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. AS et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 6, 2012, line 1. DEFENDANTs CALIFORNIA RECONVEYANCE COMPANY and JPMORGAN CHASE BANK's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Continued to September 14, 2012, on court's own motion. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HENRY DEGUZMAN CRUZ et al VS. JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. AS et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 6, 2012, line 1. DEFENDANT SC PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC.'s MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Continued to September 14, 2012, on court's own motion. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MOHSIN AHMMED VS. BANK OF AMERICA N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 6, 2012, line 2. DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Sustain with leave to amend to allege in good faith, 1) tender or exeception from, 2) tolling of statute of limitations, and 3) all elements of each cause of action. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SHILOH FULL GOSPEL CHURCH et al VS. JOHN DEMATTEI
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 6, 2012, line 11. DEFENDANT JOHN DEMATTEI's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Off calendar, per moving party. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RODOLFO VELASQUEZ VS. BANK OF AMERICA NATIONAL ASSOCIATION et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 6, 2012, line 12. PLAINTIFF RODOLFO VELASQUEZ's Motion for Preliminary Injunction. Grant preliminary injunction. Appears plaintiff can prevail on breach of contract. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: STEVE BECKERMAN VS. DAVID GIBSON et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 6, 2012, line 3. PLAINTIFF STEVE BECKERMAN's Motion to Enforce Stipulation. Grant, no opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RALAN WONG VS. TIFFANY BARBER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: (Amended) Ntc Of Mtn For A Stay Of Proceedings/Alt For An Order Finding That The Instant Action Is Not One For Declaratory Relief; Etc
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 6, 2012, line 4. DEFENDANTs TIFFANY BARBER, SARAH SHARAF and MATT PINNA's Amended Motion For A Stay Of Proceedings/Alternatively For An Order Finding That The Instant Action Is Not One For Declaratory Relief. Continued to September 20, 2012 per stipulation of the parties. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY AS TRUSTEE VS. ALICIA NICOLE POWELL et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 6, 2012, line 5. DEFENDANT CHARLNETTA HART's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Overrule, five days to answer. Alleged tenancy prejudgment claimant is affirmative defense. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARGARET NARRON AS TRUSTEE OF THE NARRON FAMILY VS. CACEY GRAY AKA NIC GRAY et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 6, 2012, line 6. DEFENDANTs ROBERT GARRETT and NICK GRAY's MOTION TO STRIKE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Deny Motion to Strike, untimley CCP 1005. Grant Motion to Quash. Plaintiff not properly substituted. Plaintiff's request to file post filing notice denied. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DAVIS REALTY CO., INC. VS. EDGAR GEDDLING et al

rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 6, 2012, line 13. DEFENDANT EDGAR GEDDLING's Motion To Dismiss Or Abate Action. Off calendar, untimely per CCP 1005. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DAVIS REALTY CO., INC. VS. EDGAR GEDDLING et al

rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 6, 2012, line 13. DEFENDANT EDGAR GEDDLING's Motion For Leave To File An Amended Answer. Off calendar, untimely per CCP 1005. = (501/REQ)
Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 6, 2012, line 14. DEFENDANT DWAYNE ROBINSON's MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT. Hearing required. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 6, 2012, line 7. DEFENDANT THEASTER MCGEE's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Hearing required. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA VS. GAIL STRONG et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 6, 2012, line 9. DEFENDANT GAIL STRONG's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Sustain without leave to amend. Notice fatally defective. Failed to give name. = (501/REQ)
